content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ Attacker-setheader('x-user-id')
P: strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') → prefer(session.userId)
V: test_valid_userId_in_session ∧ test_invalid_userId_from_header
R: ! unauthenticated_access ∧ ! user_impersonation
A: Validate(headers['x-user-id']) ∧ Use_only_session_userId_if_authenticated

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') before merge.
